Bridge.addBridge: (platform: string, customBridge: Record<string, unknown>) => void — 为某 platform 注册扩展能力，与 Browser 拍平后参与 _getCurrentBridge

Bridge.load: (params: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void — 加载平台 SDK；params 可含 getScriptSrc({ platform }) => string、onSuccess、onError 等，见 JSDoc
Bridge.config: (params: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void — 鉴权配置；getConfigUrl、formatHeaders、formatPayload、formatResponse、onSuccess、onError 等，见 JSDoc
Bridge.back: (delta?: number, platform?: string) => void — 返回上一页/关窗等，与地址栏 isFromApp 等规则见 JSDoc 与 utils/back
Bridge.closeWindow: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void — 关闭 WebView/窗口；params: onSuccess、onError
Bridge.onBack: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void — 拦截物理返回/手势；各端参数字段名以实现为准
Bridge.setTitle: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — 设置标题；title、onSuccess、onError；无 setTitle 时 undefined
Bridge.openWindow: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — url、title、target；无 openWindow 时 undefined
Bridge.goHome: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => unknown | undefined — 回首页；无 goHome 时 undefined
Bridge.tel: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => unknown | undefined — number 电话；无 tel 时 undefined
Bridge.openLocation: (params?: { latitude?, longitude?, type?, name?, address?, scale?, onSuccess?, onError? }, platform?: string) => void — 打开地图；type 默认 wgs84，见 JSDoc
Bridge.getLocation: (params?: { type?, onSuccess?: SuccessCallback, onError?, onCancel? }, platform?: string) => void — 容器定位，见 JSDoc
Bridge.getBrowserLocation: (params?: { type?, onSuccess?, onError?, [key: string]: unknown }, platform?: string) => void | undefined — 浏览器 Geolocation；无 getBrowserLocation 时 undefined
Bridge.scanCode: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — scanType、onSuccess、onError、onCancel；无 scanCode 时 undefined
Bridge.chooseMedia: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — 选图/视频等；count、sourceType、mediaType 等，见 JSDoc
Bridge.uploadFile: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — localFile、getUploadUrl、formatHeaders 等，见 JSDoc
Bridge.previewMedia: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void — index、sources、onSuccess 等，见 JSDoc
Bridge.previewFile: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — fileUrl、fileName?、fileSize?；无 previewFile 时 undefined
Bridge.share: (params?: Record<string, unknown>, platform?: string) => void | undefined — title(必填)、description、url、imageUrl、onSuccess、onError；无 share 时 undefined
Bridge.detectFace: (params?: { getConfig?, onSuccess?, onError? }, platform?: string) => void | undefined — 人脸活体等；无 detectFace 时 undefined
Bridge.utils: Record — back: 与 isFromApp 等组合；formatOpenLocationCoord: 国内外坐标系转换，见各文件
export_types: from './types': SuccessResult, ErrorResult, CancelResult, SuccessCallback, ErrorCallback, CancelCallback
